# Obsidian MCP Server

Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for Obsidian vault management.

## Overview

This project provides a comprehensive MCP server that enables AI assistants to interact with Obsidian vaults. It supports session management, topic organization, decision tracking, and Git integration.

## Features

- **Session Management**: Track conversation sessions and link to related content
- **Topic Pages**: Create and manage technical documentation
- **Decisions**: Record architectural decisions with full context
- **Git Integration**: Automatic repository detection and commit tracking
- **Search**: Semantic and keyword-based vault search
- **Maintenance**: Automated vault organization and link validation

## Technical Stack

- TypeScript
- Node.js
- MCP SDK
- Vitest for testing
